description: Generate per-video Cosmos augmentation configs and a manifest from an input-video directory and a pipeline config dir (deterministic, read-only inputs).
rules: read-only on inputs — discovers .mp4/.avi/.mkv under INPUT_DIR and reads CONFIG_DIR; never mutates either
deterministic: seeds via sha256 (random.seed(42)); same inputs yield the same configs + manifest
writes one rendered <video>_aug<N>.yaml per video x n_augmentations plus manifest.yaml under record_store/configs
CONFIG_DIR must provide workflow_config.yaml (or input_config.json/test_config.yaml) and the referenced base augmentation YAML
all output (configs + manifest + log) lands under record_store
usage: Set INPUT_DIR (dir of input videos) and CONFIG_DIR (pipeline config dir with workflow_config.yaml + augmentation/*.yaml). Optional OUTPUT_DIR (defaults to record_store/configs). Output: configs/manifest.yaml.
limitation: Needs python3 with PyYAML and omegaconf installed; without omegaconf the porter degrades gracefully and writes an empty manifest. Config generation only — does not run augmentation, captioning, or any GPU/Cosmos inference.
